I have a bunch of secret AI benchmarks I only reveal when they fall, and today one did. I give the AI 1000 words written by me and never published, and ask them who the author is. They generally give flattering wrong answers (see ChatGPT, below:) https://t.co/zIoHMdO39h

Some of you ran into Opus 4.7 refusing normal code edits with "this might be malware" warnings. That was a bug on our side, not the model being cautious.

Older builds applied a stale safety prompt that Opus 4.7 doesn't need. Run claude update or relaunch the app.
